textByHash.013a0759f49510cb4348855aaedc61db0b01bb37: I'm afraid you're not an experienced enough captain to have a crew yet. Keep working at it though and I'm sure you'll get there in no time.
textByHash.20c05d1e82008a848a7b8802bd6e8a41f4c0c1e5: QA-123 requires all crew to pass a mandatory cargo data protection course if the vessel can be fitted with a cargo hold.
textByHash.44c44f1a75e77db1c40a38ea0c85fa61b3beb543: And if I miss something, the fines are usually fairly small!
textByHash.646bca66b67bd60dbe9818fb599b95cc680a3679: You'd be surprised. Quality assurance guideline QA-275 states all crew must be appropriately fit and healthy after being subjected to QA form QA-275.
textByHash.7f2466b5df573ac1c8e15e94b78831817321149b: QA-123 requires all crew to pass a mandatory cargo data protection course if the ship can be fitted with a cargo hold.
textByHash.7f2d96d2d85f96d0e64698841b308f9905a2ab26: Well, it's not for everyone. Still, if you ever find yourself in need of a crew, you know where to find me.
textByHash.813ec6532d6915010918b68cdd9b1a6cdfc8c85f: I'm the crew registrar. Here to cut through the red tape of crew management for anyone who needs it!
textByHash.aad2e5b521d3681dea837e00ce13f98877dbef9b: Then of course we have QA-441, which defines the background checks that any crewmate operating a sail must pass. And all that's without even considering QA- 215...
textByHash.ac4ceefab79bf29fea1b7a43c2d82333503ea7cf: I'm afraid you have no crew to manage right now.
textByHash.e7add5d12800e185964387dddfc8e1c9ce192dc3: Don't worry, I'll deal with most of the technical details for you.
